result.summary: I found 2 visual issues: the fixed bottom navigation is covering part of the game grid, and several horizontal sections are clipped on the right edge, making cards/tabs look cut off.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the content area, hiding the lower row of game tiles so only the top portions are visible.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the page content or make the footer navigation non-overlapping so the last row of tiles remains fully visible.

issues.description: Several tabs/cards on the right side are partially cut off, including the top category row and game carousels, which makes the layout look clipped.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the horizontal spacing or carousel viewport so partially visible items are intentional and clearly scrollable, or ensure the container fits within the screen width.
